title: A High-Accuracy Optical Music Recognition Method Based on Bottleneck Residual Convolutions
summary: Optical Music Recognition (OMR) aims to convert printed or handwritten music score images into editable symbolic representations. This paper presents an end-to-end OMR framework that combines residual bottleneck convolutions with bidirectional gated recurrent unit (BiGRU)-based sequence modeling. A convolutional neural network with ResNet-v2-style residual bottleneck blocks and multi-scale dilated convolutions is used to extract features that encode both fine-grained symbol details and global staff-line structures. The extracted feature sequences are then fed into a BiGRU network to model temporal dependencies among musical symbols. The model is trained using the Connectionist Temporal Classification loss, enabling end-to-end prediction without explicit alignment annotations. Experimental results on the Camera-PrIMuS and PrIMuS datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. On Camera-PrIMuS, the proposed method achieves a sequence error rate (SeER) of $7.52\%$ and a symbol error rate (SyER) of $0.45\%$, with pitch, type, and note accuracies of $99.33\%$, $99.60\%$, and $99.28\%$, respectively. The average training time is 1.74~s per epoch, demonstrating high computational efficiency while maintaining strong recognition performance. On PrIMuS, the method achieves a SeER of $8.11\%$ and a SyER of $0.49\%$, with pitch, type, and note accuracies of $99.27\%$, $99.58\%$, and $99.21\%$, respectively. A fine-grained error analysis further confirms the effectiveness of the proposed model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合残差瓶颈卷积和双向GRU的端到端光学乐谱识别框架，在Camera-PrIMuS和PrIMuS数据集上分别达到7.52%和8.11%的序列错误率，具有高效率和高精度。
AI.motivation: 光学乐谱识别(OMR)旨在将印刷或手写乐谱图像转换为可编辑的符号表示，传统方法需要复杂的特征工程和显式对齐，端到端识别是该领域的重要挑战。
AI.method: 采用ResNet-v2风格的残差瓶颈模块和多尺度扩张卷积提取细粒度符号细节和全局五线谱结构特征，然后使用BiGRU网络建模音乐符号的时序依赖，通过CTC损失实现端到端训练。
AI.result: 在Camera-PrIMuS数据集上实现7.52%序列错误率和0.45%符号错误率，音高、类型和音符准确率分别为99.33%、99.60%和99.28%；在PrIMuS数据集上也达到相似的高性能，平均每轮训练时间仅需1.74秒。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的端到端OMR框架有效结合了卷积特征的视觉表示能力和循环网络的时序建模能力，在保持高计算效率的同时实现了优秀的乐谱识别性能。

title: From Inheritance to Saturation: Disentangling the Evolution of Visual Redundancy for Architecture-Aware MLLM Inference Acceleration
comment: 16 pages, 14 figures, plus appendix, accepted at ACL 2026
summary: High-resolution Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) face prohibitive computational costs during inference due to the explosion of visual tokens. Existing acceleration strategies, such as token pruning or layer sparsity, suffer from severe "backbone dependency", performing well on Vicuna or Mistral architectures (e.g., LLaVA) but causing significant performance degradation when transferred to architectures like Qwen. To address this, we leverage truncated matrix entropy to uncover a universal three-stage inference lifecycle, decoupling visual redundancy into universal Intrinsic Visual Redundancy (IVR) and architecture-dependent Secondary Saturation Redundancy (SSR). Guided by this insight, we propose HalfV, a framework that first mitigates IVR via a unified pruning strategy and then adaptively handles SSR based on its specific manifestation. Experiments demonstrate that HalfV achieves superior efficiency-performance trade-offs across diverse backbones. Notably, on Qwen25-VL, it retains 96.8\% performance at a 4.1$\times$ FLOPs speedup, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art baselines. Our code is available at https://github.com/civilizwa/HalfV.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了HalfV框架，通过解耦视觉冗余并采用统一剪枝策略，解决了高分辨率多模态大语言模型推理加速中的架构依赖问题，在多个backbone上实现了4.1倍的FLO加速并保持96.8%的性能。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率多模态大语言模型在推理过程中由于视觉标记爆炸导致计算成本过高，现有的token剪枝或层稀疏策略存在严重的'backbone依赖性'，在特定架构上效果好但在其他架构如Qwen上性能显著下降。
AI.method: 通过截断矩阵熵发现通用的三阶段推理生命周期，将视觉冗余解耦为通用固有视觉冗余(IVR)和架构相关的次级饱和冗余(SSR)：首先通过统一剪枝策略缓解IVR，然后基于SSR的具体表现自适应处理SSR。
AI.result: 在多样化的backbone上实现了卓越的效率-性能权衡，特别是在Qwen25-VL上保持96.8%性能的同时达到4.1倍FLO加速，显著优于现有最先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: HalfV框架通过解耦视觉冗余的通用和架构相关成分，有效解决了多模态大语言模型推理加速的架构依赖问题，为跨架构的高效推理提供了通用解决方案。

title: Latent-Compressed Variational Autoencoder for Video Diffusion Models
summary: Video variational autoencoders (VAEs) used in latent diffusion models typically require a sufficiently large number of latent channels to ensure high-quality video reconstruction. However, recent studies have revealed that an excessive number of latent channels can impede the convergence of latent diffusion models and deteriorate their generative performance, even when reconstruction quality remains high. We propose a latent compression method that removes high-frequency components in video latent representations rather than directly reducing the number of channels, which often compromises reconstruction fidelity. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior video reconstruction quality compared to strong baselines while maintaining the same overall compression ratio.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的视频潜在空间压缩方法，通过移除高频分量而非直接减少通道数，在保持高压缩比的同时提升视频重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有视频VAE需要大量潜在通道确保高质量重建，但过多通道会阻碍潜在扩散模型收敛并降低生成性能，直接减少通道数又会损害重建保真度。
AI.method: 提出一种潜在压缩方法，在视频潜在表示中移除高频分量，而不是直接降低通道数量。
AI.result: 实验证明，在保持相同总压缩比的前提下，所提方法相比强基准方法获得了更优越的视频重建质量。
AI.conclusion: 通过在潜在空间进行更智能的频率分量压缩，可以同时解决视频重建质量和扩散模型性能之间的权衡问题。

title: Positioning radiata pine branches requiring pruning by drone stereo vision
summary: This paper presents a stereo-vision-based system mounted on a drone for detecting and localising radiata pine branches to support autonomous pruning. The proposed pipeline comprises two stages: branch segmentation and depth estimation. For segmentation, YOLOv8, YOLOv9, and Mask R-CNN variants are compared on a custom dataset of 71 stereo image pairs captured with a ZED Mini camera. For depth estimation, both a traditional method (SGBM with WLS filtering) and deep-learning-based methods (PSMNet, ACVNet, GWCNet, MobileStereoNet, RAFT-Stereo, and NeRF-Supervised Deep Stereo) are evaluated. A centroid-based triangulation algorithm with MAD outlier rejection is proposed to compute branch distance from the segmentation mask and disparity map. Qualitative evaluation at distances of 1-2 m indicates that the deep learning-based disparity maps produce more coherent depth estimates than SGBM, demonstrating the feasibility of low-cost stereo vision for automated branch positioning in forestry.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一套基于立体视觉的无人机系统，用于检测和定位辐射松树枝，采用分割和深度估计两个阶段，评估了多种深度学习方法，验证了低成本立体视觉在林业自主修剪中的可行性。
AI.motivation: 为林业自主修剪提供准确的树枝定位支持，开发基于无人机的立体视觉系统，以实现自动化、低成本的枝干检测与定位。
AI.method: 系统包含两个主要阶段：树枝分割阶段比较了YOLOv8、YOLOv9和Mask R-CNN等模型；深度估计阶段评估了传统SGBM方法和PSMNet、ACVNet等多种深度学习方法，并提出了质心三角化算法结合MAD异常值剔除来计算树枝距离。
AI.result: 在1-2米距离的定性评估中，深度学习视差图比传统SGBM方法产生更一致的深度估计，证明了低成本立体视觉用于林业自动化树枝定位的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 基于深度学习的立体视觉系统为林业自动修剪提供了有效的解决方案，在准确性和成本效益方面具有明显优势，为实际应用奠定了技术基础。

title: Multimodal Claim Extraction for Fact-Checking
summary: Automated Fact-Checking (AFC) relies on claim extraction as a first step, yet existing methods largely overlook the multimodal nature of today's misinformation. Social media posts often combine short, informal text with images such as memes, screenshots, and photos, creating challenges that differ from both text-only claim extraction and well-studied multimodal tasks like image captioning or visual question answering. In this work, we present the first benchmark for multimodal claim extraction from social media, consisting of posts containing text and one or more images, annotated with gold-standard claims derived from real-world fact-checkers. We evaluate state-of-the-art multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) under a three-part evaluation framework (semantic alignment, faithfulness, and decontextualization) and find that baseline MLLMs struggle to model rhetorical intent and contextual cues. To address this, we introduce MICE, an intent-aware framework which shows improvements in intent-critical cases.

AI.tldr: 本文创建了第一个多模态声明提取基准，发现现有MLLM在处理社交媒体多模态内容时存在不足，并提出了意图感知框架MICE来改善性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自动事实核查方法主要关注文本声明提取，忽视了社交媒体中普遍存在的多模态（文本+图像）虚假信息，这类内容具有独特的挑战性。
AI.method: 1) 构建包含社交媒体文本和图像的多模态声明提取基准数据集；2) 提出三部分评估框架（语义对齐、忠实度、去语境化）；3) 设计意图感知框架MICE来更好地理解修辞意图和语境线索。
AI.result: 基准测试显示，现有最先进的多模态大语言模型在建模修辞意图和语境线索方面表现不佳；MICE框架在意图关键案例中显示出改进效果。
AI.conclusion: 社交媒体多模态声明提取是一个新的挑战，现有的MLLM需要更好的意图理解能力；提出的基准和MICE框架为未来的研究提供了重要基础。

title: Erasing Thousands of Concepts: Towards Scalable and Practical Concept Erasure for Text-to-Image Diffusion Models
summary: Large-scale text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models deliver remarkable visual fidelity but pose safety risks due to their capacity to reproduce undesirable content, such as copyrighted ones. Concept erasure has emerged as a mitigation strategy, yet existing approaches struggle to balance scalability, precision, and robustness, which restricts their applicability to erasing only a few hundred concepts. To address these limitations, we present Erasing Thousands of Concepts (ETC), a scalable framework capable of erasing thousands of concepts while preserving generation quality. Our method first models low-rank concept distributions via a Student's t-distribution Mixture Model (tMM). It enables pin-point erasure of target concepts via affine optimal transport while preserving others by anchoring the boundaries of target concept distributions without pre-defined anchor concepts. We then train a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE)-based module, termed MoEraser, which removes target embeddings while preserving the anchor embeddings. By injecting noise into the text embedding projector and fine-tuning MoEraser for recovery, our framework achieves robustness to white-box attack such as module removal. Extensive experiments on over 2,000 concepts across heterogeneous domains and diffusion models demerate state-of-the-art scalability and precision in large-scale concept erasure.

AI.tldr: ETC是一种可扩展的概念擦除框架，能够在文本到图像扩散模型中精确擦除数千个不良概念，同时保持生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的大规模文本到图像扩散模型存在安全风险，可能生成不受欢迎的内容（如版权内容）。当前的概念擦除方法在可扩展性、精确性和鲁棒性之间难以平衡，仅能处理数百个概念的擦除。
AI.method: 1) 使用t分布混合模型(tMM)建模低秩概念分布；2) 通过仿射最优传输实现目标概念的精确擦除；3) 通过锚定目标概念分布边界来保留其他概念；4) 训练基于专家混合(MoE)的MoEraser模块来移除目标嵌入并保留锚定嵌入；5) 通过在文本嵌入投影器中注入噪声并微调MoEraser实现白盒攻击鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在超过2000个跨异构域和扩散模型的概念上进行的广泛实验证明了ETC在大规模概念擦除方面的最先进可扩展性和精确性。
AI.conclusion: ETC框架成功解决了现有方法在可扩展性、精确性和鲁棒性方面的限制，为大规模文本到图像概念擦除提供了有效解决方案。

title: Cross-Family Speculative Decoding for Polish Language Models on Apple~Silicon: An Empirical Evaluation of Bielik~11B with UAG-Extended MLX-LM
summary: Speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference by using a small draft model to propose k candidate tokens for a target model to verify. While effective for same-tokenizer pairs on high-bandwidth GPUs, its applicability to cross-family pairs with mismatched tokenizers and consumer-grade unified memory remains underexplored. We extend the MLX-LM framework with Universal Assisted Generation (UAG) to enable cross-tokenizer speculative decoding on Apple Silicon. We evaluate Bielik 11B-Instruct (Mistral-based) as the target model, paired with three draft models: Bielik 1.5B (Qwen-based with custom tokenizer), Qwen2.5-1.5B, and Llama 3.2-1B. Experiments on three Polish-language datasets (Wikipedia, pl_alpaca, synthetic) use draft lengths k in {2, 4, 6} to compare naive and context-aware token translation. Results show: (1) context-aware translation consistently improves acceptance rates across all configurations; (2) the Polish-specialized Bielik 1.5B achieves lower acceptance than general-purpose Qwen2.5 and Llama 3.2 drafters; (3) throughput on Apple Silicon is content-dependent, reaching 1.7x speedup for structured text but failing for varied instructions; and (4) verification cost on unified memory does not amortize as theory predicts because both models are memory-bandwidth bound, making sequential drafting expensive relative to batched verification. We propose a hardware-aware speedup formula and characterize conditions for cross-family speculative decoding on Apple Silicon. This is the first systematic evaluation of cross-family speculative decoding for Polish LLMs and the first empirical study of UAG-based decoding on unified memory architectures.

AI.tldr: 本研究扩展了MLX-LM框架，首次在Apple Silicon上实现了跨词元器族的投机解码，发现上下文感知翻译能显著提高接受率，但在统一内存架构下顺序草稿成本较高，加速效果受内容类型限制。
AI.motivation: 传统投机解码在相同词元器对和高带宽GPU上有效，但对跨家族词元器不匹配和消费级统一内存环境的适用性尚未充分探索。波兰语大语言模型缺乏跨家族投机解码的系统性评估。
AI.method: 在Apple Silicon上实现通用辅助生成(UAG)，使用Bielik 11B-Instruct作为目标模型，与三个不同架构的草稿模型配对，在三个波兰语数据集上评估不同草稿长度和两种词元翻译策略。
AI.result: 上下文感知翻译在所有配置中都能提高接受率；专业化的波兰语模型接受率反而低于通用模型；在结构化文本上可达1.7倍加速，但多样化指令下无法加速；统一内存下验证成本无法摊销。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个针对波兰语LLM的跨家族投机解码系统评估，也是首个基于UAG的统一内存架构实证研究，提出了硬件感知加速公式并量化了在Apple Silicon上实现跨家族投机解码的条件。

title: A Survey of Spatial Memory Representations for Efficient Robot Navigation
comment: Accepted at the Women in Computer Vision (WiCV) Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: As vision-based robots navigate larger environments, their spatial memory grows without bound, eventually exhausting computational resources, particularly on embedded platforms (8-16GB shared memory, $<$30W) where adding hardware is not an option. This survey examines the spatial memory efficiency problem across 88 references spanning 52 systems (1989-2025), from occupancy grids to neural implicit representations. We introduce the $α= M_{\text{peak}} / M_{\text{map}}$, the ratio of peak runtime memory (the total RAM or GPU memory consumed during operation) to saved map size (the persistent checkpoint written to disk), exposing the gap between published map sizes and actual deployment cost. Independent profiling on an NVIDIA A100 GPU reveals that $α$ spans two orders of magnitude within neural methods alone, ranging from 2.3 (Point-SLAM) to 215 (NICE-SLAM, whose 47,MB map requires 10GB at runtime), showing that memory architecture, not paradigm label, determines deployment feasibility. We propose a standardized evaluation protocol comprising memory growth rate, query latency, memory-completeness curves, and throughput degradation, none of which current benchmarks capture. Through a Pareto frontier analysis with explicit benchmark separation, we show that no single paradigm dominates within its evaluation regime: 3DGS methods achieve the best absolute accuracy at 90-254,MB map size on Replica, while scene graphs provide semantic abstraction at predictable cost. We provide the first independently measured $α$ reference values and an $α$-aware budgeting algorithm enabling practitioners to assess deployment feasibility on target hardware prior to implementation.

AI.tldr: 这篇调查论文揭示了视觉机器人空间内存效率问题，通过引入α比率（峰值运行内存与保存地图大小之比）暴露了实际部署成本与发表论文地图大小之间的巨大差距，并提出了标准化评估协议和预算算法。
AI.motivation: 随着基于视觉的机器人在更大环境中导航，其空间内存会无限增长，最终耗尽计算资源。特别是在嵌入式平台（8-16GB共享内存，<30W）上，无法额外添加硬件，这成为实际部署的关键瓶颈。
AI.method: 通过调研52个系统（1989-2025）的88篇文献，从占用栅格到神经隐式表示，引入α=M_peak/M_map比率。在NVIDIA A100 GPU上进行独立性能分析，实施帕累托前沿分析和显式基准分离，标准化评估协议包括内存增长率、查询延迟、内存-完整性曲线和吞吐量降级。
AI.result: 研究发现神经方法中α比率跨越两个数量级，从2.3（Point-SLAM）到215（NICE-SLAM）。没有单一范式在其评估体系中占主导地位：3DGS方法在Replica上以90-254MB地图大小实现最佳绝对精度，而场景图以可预测成本提供语义抽象。
AI.conclusion: 论文提供了首个独立测量的α参考值和α感知预算算法，使实践者能够在实际实现之前评估目标硬件的部署可行性。内存架构而非范式标签决定了部署的可行性。

title: Brain-CLIPLM: Decoding Compressed Semantic Representations in EEG for Language Reconstruction
summary: Decoding natural language from non-invasive electroencephalography (EEG) remains fundamentally limited by low signal-to-noise ratio and restricted information bandwidth. This raises a fundamental question regarding whether sentence-level linguistic structure can be reliably recovered from such signals. In this work, we suggest that this assumption may not hold under realistic information constraints, and instead propose a semantic compression hypothesis in which EEG signals encode a compressed set of semantic anchors rather than full linguistic structure. Under our new perspective, direct sentence reconstruction becomes an overparameterized objective relative to the intrinsic information capacity of EEG. To address this mismatch, we introduce Brain-CLIPLM, a two-stage framework that decomposes EEG-to-text decoding into semantic anchor extraction via contrastive learning and sentence reconstruction using a retrieval-grounded large language model (LLM) with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, following a granularity matching principle that aligns decoding complexity with neural information capacity. Evaluated on the Zurich Cognitive Language Processing Corpus, Brain-CLIPLM achieves 67.55\% top-5 and 85.00\% top-25 sentence retrieval accuracy, significantly outperforming direct decoding baseline, while cross-subject evaluation confirms robust generalization. Control analyses, including permutation testing, further demonstrate that EEG-derived representations carry sentence-specific information beyond language model priors. These results suggest that EEG-to-text decoding is better framed as recovering compressed semantic content rather than reconstructing full sentences, providing a biologically grounded and data-efficient pathway for non-invasive brain-computer interfaces.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Brain-CLIPLM框架，通过将EEG到文本的解码分解为语义锚点提取和基于检索的大语言模型重构，在EEG信号上实现了67.55% top-5和85.00% top-25的句子检索准确率。
AI.motivation: 非侵入式脑电图(EEG)存在信噪比低和信息带宽受限的问题，使得从EEG中直接恢复完整句子级的语言结构变得困难。研究质疑了这种假设的可行性，提出了EEG信号可能只编码压缩的语义锚点而非完整语言结构的新观点。
AI.method: 提出Brain-CLIPLM两阶段框架：第一阶段通过对比学习从EEG中提取语义锚点；第二阶段使用基于检索的大语言模型(LLM)结合思维链(Chain-of-Thought)推理进行句子重构，遵循粒度匹配原则对齐解码复杂性与神经信息容量。
AI.result: 在苏黎世认知语言处理语料库上达到67.55% top-5和85.00% top-25句子检索准确率，显著优于直接解码基线，跨被试评估证实了鲁棒泛化能力。控制分析表明EEG衍生的表征携带超越语言模型先验的句子特定信息。
AI.conclusion: EEG到文本的解码应该被重新定义为恢复压缩的语义内容而非重构完整句子，这为非侵入式脑机接口提供了具有生物学基础且数据高效的路径。

title: Dynamic Eraser for Guided Concept Erasure in Diffusion Models
summary: Concept erasure in Text-To-Image (T2I) diffusion models is vital for safe content generation, but existing inference-time methods face significant limitations. Feature-correction approaches often cause uncontrolled over-correction, while token-level interventions struggle with semantic granularity and context. Moreover, both types of methods are prone to severe semantic drift or even complete representation collapse. To address these challenges, we present Dynamic Semantic Steering (DSS), a lightweight, training-free framework for interpretable and controllable concept erasure. DSS introduces: 1) Sensitive Semantic Boundary Modeling (SSBM) to automate the discovery of safe semantic anchors, and 2) Sensitive Semantic Guidance (SSG), which leverages cross-attention features for precise detection and performs correction via a closed-form solution derived from a well-posed objective. This ensures optimal suppression of sensitive content while preserving benign semantics. DSS achieves an average erasure rate of 91.0\%, significantly outperforming SOTA methods (from 18.6\% to 85.9\%) with minimal impact on output fidelity.

AI.tldr: 提出名为动态语义引导(DSS)的训练无关框架，通过构建安全语义边界和闭环校正方案，在文本到图像扩散模型中实现可控的概念擦除，擦除率达91.0%。
AI.motivation: 现有推理时概念擦除方法存在严重不足：特征校正方法容易失控过度校正，词级干预面临语义粒度和上下文问题，且两种方法都容易导致语义漂移或表征崩溃，需要更可控的解决方案。
AI.method: DSS框架包含两个核心组件：1)敏感语义边界建模(SSBM)自动发现安全语义锚点；2)敏感语义引导(SSG)利用跨注意力特征进行精确检测，通过良构目标函数导出的闭环解执行校正。
AI.result: DSS实现了平均91.0%的擦除率，显著优于现有方法(18.6%-85.9%)，同时最小化了对输出保真度的影响。
AI.conclusion: DSS作为轻量级、训练无关的框架，为文本到图像模型的 安全内容生成提供了可解释、可控的概念擦除方案，有效平衡了内容安全与生成质量。

title: CFMS: Towards Explainable and Fine-Grained Chinese Multimodal Sarcasm Detection Benchmark
summary: Multimodal sarcasm detection has recently garnered significant attention. However, existing benchmarks suffer from coarse-grained annotations and limited cultural coverage, which hinder research into fine-grained semantic understanding. To address this, we construct CFMS, the first fine-grained multimodal sarcasm dataset tailored for Chinese social media. It comprises 2,796 high-quality image-text pairs and provides a triple-level annotation framework: sarcasm identification, target recognition, and explanation generation. We find that the fine-grained explanation annotations effectively guide AI in generating images with explicit sarcastic intent. Furthermore, we curate a high-consistency parallel Chinese-English metaphor subset (200 entries each), revealing significant limitations of current models in metaphoric reasoning. To overcome the constraints of traditional retrieval methods, we propose a Reinforcement Learning-augmented In-Context Learning strategy (PGDS) to dynamically optimize exemplar selection. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CFMS provides a solid foundation for building reliable multimodal sarcasm understanding systems, and the PGDS method significantly outperforms existing baselines on key tasks. Our data and code are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/CFMS-E8F9.

AI.tldr: 本研究构建了首个中文细粒度多模态讽刺数据集CFMS，包含三层标注框架，并提出强化学习增强的上下文学习策略PGDS，显著提升了多模态讽刺理解效果。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态讽刺检测基准存在标注粒度粗、文化覆盖有限等问题，阻碍了细粒度语义理解研究的发展，急需构建更高质量、更贴合中文社交媒体的讽刺数据集。
AI.method: 构建CFMS数据集，包含2796个高质量图文对，提供讽刺识别、目标识别和解释生成三层标注；提出PGDS策略，通过强化学习动态优化示例选择，克服传统检索方法的限制。
AI.result: 细粒度解释标注能有效指导AI生成具有明确讽刺意图的图像；构建的中英隐喻子集揭示了当前模型在隐喻推理方面的显著不足；PGDS方法在关键任务上显著超越现有基线。
AI.conclusion: CFMS为构建可靠的多模态讽刺理解系统提供了坚实基础，PGDS策略有效提升了模型性能，该研究为细粒度多模态讽刺理解开辟了新方向。

title: DexWorldModel: Causal Latent World Modeling towards Automated Learning of Embodied Tasks
summary: Deploying generative World-Action Models for manipulation is severely bottlenecked by redundant pixel-level reconstruction, $\mathcal{O}(T)$ memory scaling, and sequential inference latency. We introduce the Causal Latent World Model (CLWM), which employs DINOv3 features as generative targets to disentangle interaction semantics from visual noise, yielding highly robust domain generalization. To overcome memory scaling, CLWM features a Dual-State Test-Time Training (TTT) Memory that guarantees a strict $\mathcal{O}(1)$ footprint for long-horizon tasks. To overcome deployment latency, we propose Speculative Asynchronous Inference (SAI) to mask partial diffusion denoising behind physical execution, cutting blocking latency by about $50\%$. To scale robust policies, we present EmbodiChain, an online framework that establishes the Efficiency Law by injecting an infinite flow of physics-grounded trajectories during training. Extensive experiments validate that CLWM achieves state-of-the-art performance in complex dual-arm simulation and unprecedented zero-shot sim-to-real transfer on physical robots, outperforming baselines explicitly finetuned on real-world data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了因果潜在世界模型(CLWM)，通过使用DINOv3特征作为生成目标解决了传统生成式世界-动作模型的重构冗余、内存扩展和推理延迟问题，实现了复杂的双臂机器人操作任务和零样本仿真到现实世界的转移。
AI.motivation: 传统的生成式世界-动作模型在机器人操作部署中受到三个主要瓶颈制约：像素级重构的冗余性、内存随时间步线性增长(O(T))以及顺序推理的延迟问题，这些限制了模型在实际机器人应用中的效果。
AI.method: CLWM采用DINOv2特征作为生成目标来分离交互语义与视觉噪声；设计了双状态测试时训练(TTT)内存机制确保长期任务中严格的O(1)内存占用；提出推测异步推理(SAI)通过将部分扩散去噪隐藏在物理执行后来减少阻塞延迟；引入EmbodiChain在线框架通过注入基于物理的轨迹流来扩展鲁棒策略。
AI.result: CLWM在复杂双臂仿真任务中达到了最先进的性能，并在物理机器人上实现了前所未有的零样本仿真到现实世界转移，性能优于显式在真实数据上微调的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过特征级生成、常数内存设计和异步推理优化，CLWM有效解决了世界模型部署的关键挑战，为复杂机器人操作任务提供了高效可靠的解决方案，并建立了效率定律来指导策略扩展。

title: Foundational Study on Authorship Attribution of Japanese Web Reviews for Actor Analysis
summary: This study investigates the applicability of authorship attribution based on stylistic features to support actor analysis in threat intelligence. As a foundational step toward future application to dark web forums, we conducted experiments using Japanese review data from clear web sources. We constructed datasets from Rakuten Ichiba reviews and compared four methods: TF-IDF with logistic regression (TF-IDF+LR), BERT embeddings with logistic regression (BERT-Emb+LR), BERT fine-tuning (BERT-FT), and metric learning with $k$-nearest neighbors (Metric+kNN). Results showed that BERT-FT achieved the best performance; however, training became unstable as the number of authors scaled to several hundred, where TF-IDF+LR proved superior in terms of accuracy, stability, and computational cost. Furthermore, Top-$k$ evaluation demonstrated the utility of candidate screening, and error analysis revealed that boilerplate text, topic dependency, and short text length were primary factors causing misclassification.

AI.tldr: 本研究探索了基于文体特征的身份归属分析在威胁情报行动者分析中的应用，发现BERT微调在少数量作者时效果最佳，但随着作者数量增加到数百人时，TF-IDF+LR方法在准确性、稳定性和计算成本方面表现更优。
AI.motivation: 为威胁情报中的行动者分析提供技术支持，特别是为未来应用于暗网论坛的身份归属分析奠定基础，需要探索适合大规模作者的文体特征分析方法。
AI.method: 使用日本乐天市场的评论数据构建数据集，比较四种方法：TF-IDF+逻辑回归、BERT嵌入+逻辑回归、BERT微调、度量学习+k近邻，并进行了Top-k评估和误差分析。
AI.result: BERT-FT在小规模作者时表现最佳，但数百名作者时训练不稳定；TF-IDF+LR在准确性和稳定性方面更胜一筹；Top-k评估证明了候选筛选的有效性；标准文本、主题依赖性和短文本是主要误分类因素。
AI.conclusion: 基于文体特征的身份归属分析在威胁情报行动者分析中具有应用潜力，方法选择需要根据作者规模进行权衡，BERT-FT适合小规模场景，TF-IDF+LR更适合大规模实际应用。

title: Saccade Attention Networks: Using Transfer Learning of Attention to Reduce Network Sizes
summary: One of the limitations of transformer networks is the sequence length due to the quadratic nature of the attention matrix. Classical self attention uses the entire sequence length, however, the actual attention being used is sparse. Humans use a form of sparse attention when analyzing an image or scene called saccades. Focusing on key features greatly reduces computation time. By using a network (Saccade Attention Network) to learn where to attend from a large pre-trained model, we can use it to pre-process images and greatly reduce network size by reducing the input sequence length to just the key features being attended to. Our results indicate that you can reduce calculations by close to 80% and produce similar results.

AI.tldr: 提出Saccade Attention Network，通过学习人类眼扫视机制，从预训练模型中学习关注关键特征，将输入序列长度减少80%，在保持相似性能的同时大幅降低计算量。
AI.motivation: Transformer网络存在序列长度限制问题，传统自注意力计算复杂度为二次方，但实际使用的注意力是稀疏的。人类通过眼扫视(Saccades)机制实现对关键特征的稀疏关注，这为优化提供了生物学启发。
AI.method: 构建Saccade Attention Network，从大型预训练模型中学习应该关注的关键特征位置，从而预处理图像，将输入序列长度缩减到仅包含这些关键特征。
AI.result: 该方法能够减少接近80%的计算量，同时产生与原始方法相似的结果。
AI.conclusion: 受人类视觉关注机制启发的稀疏注意力方法，能够有效解决Transformer的计算复杂度问题，在保持性能的同时大幅提升效率。

title: GoCoMA: Hyperbolic Multimodal Representation Fusion for Large Language Model-Generated Code Attribution
comment: Accepted to the International Conference on Multimedia & Expo (ICME) 2026
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) trained on massive code corpora are now increasingly capable of generating code that is hard to distinguish from human-written code. This raises practical concerns, including security vulnerabilities and licensing ambiguity, and also motivates a forensic question: 'Who (or which LLM) wrote this piece of code?' We present GoCoMA, a multimodal framework that models an extrinsic hierarchy between (i) code stylometry, capturing higher-level structural and stylistic signatures, and (ii) image representations of binary pre-executable artifacts (BPEA), capturing lower-level, execution-oriented byte semantics shaped by compilation and toolchains. GoCoMA projects modality embeddings into a hyperbolic Poincaré ball, fuses them via a geodesic-cosine similarity-based cross-modal attention (GCSA) fusion mechanism, and back-projects the fused representation to Euclidean space for final LLM-source attribution. Experiments on two open-source benchmarks (CoDET-M4 and LLMAuthorBench) show that GoCoMA consistently outperforms unimodal and Euclidean multimodal baselines under identical evaluation protocols.

AI.tldr: GoCoMA是一个多模态框架，通过结合代码风格学和二进制预执行可执行文件的图像表示，在双曲空间中融合特征来实现大型语言模型代码来源的准确识别。
AI.motivation: 随着大型语言模型生成的代码越来越难以与人类编写的代码区分，这带来了安全漏洞和许可模糊性等实际问题，同时也提出了'谁（或哪个LLM）写了这段代码'的取证问题。
AI.method: GoCoMA构建了一个多模态层级框架，包括：(i)代码风格学（捕获高层次结构和风格特征），(ii)二进制预执行可执行文件的图像表示（捕获编译和工具链塑造的低层次字节语义）。框架将模态嵌入投影到双曲Poincaré球中，通过基于大地线-余弦相似度的跨模态注意力融合机制融合特征，最后将融合表示反投影回欧几里得空间进行LLM来源识别。
AI.result: 在CoDET-M4和LLMAuthorBench两个开源基准测试上，GoCoMA在相同评估协议下持续优于单模态和欧几里得多模态基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了双曲空间多模态融合在LLM代码来源识别任务中的有效性，为代码取证和来源追踪提供了新的技术途径。

title: Aletheia: Physics-Conditioned Localized Artifact Attention (PhyLAA-X) for End-to-End Generalizable and Robust Deepfake Video Detection
comment: Code: https://github.com/devghori1264/Aletheia (MIT license). Dataset notes: see Data and Code Availability section
summary:
State-of-the-art deepfake detectors achieve near-perfect in-domain accuracy yet degrade under cross-generator shifts, heavy compression, and adversarial perturbations. The core limitation remains the decoupling of semantic artifact learning from physical invariants: optical-flow discontinuities, specular-reflection inconsistencies, and cardiac-modulated reflectance (rPPG) are treated either as post-hoc features or ignored.
  We introduce PhyLAA-X, a novel physics-conditioned extension of Localized Artifact Attention (LAA-X). PhyLAA-X injects three end-to-end differentiable physics-derived feature volumes - optical-flow curl, specular-reflectance skewness, and spatially-upsampled rPPG power spectra - directly into the LAA-X attention computation via cross-attention gating and a resonance consistency loss. This forces the network to learn manipulation boundaries where semantic inconsistencies and physical violations co-occur - regions inherently harder for generative models to replicate consistently.
  PhyLAA-X is embedded across an efficient spatiotemporal ensemble (EfficientNet-B4+BiLSTM, ResNeXt-101+Transformer, Xception+causal Conv1D) with uncertainty-aware adaptive weighting. On FaceForensics++ (c23), Aletheia reaches 97.2% accuracy / 0.992 AUC-ROC; on Celeb-DF v2, 94.9% / 0.981; on DFDC, 90.8% / 0.966 - outperforming the strongest published baseline (LAA-Net [1]) by 4.1-7.3% in cross-generator settings and maintaining 79.4% accuracy under epsilon = 0.02 PGD-10 attacks. Single-backbone ablations confirm PhyLAA-X alone delivers a 4.2% cross-dataset AUC gain. The full production system is open-sourced at https://github.com/devghori1264/Aletheia (v1.2, April 2026) with pretrained weights, the adversarial corpus (referred to as ADC-2026 in this work), and complete reproducibility artifacts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PhyLAA-X框架，物理条件化的局部伪影注意力网络，将光学流卷曲、镜面反射偏度、rPPG功率谱物理特征直接注入注意力机制，提升换脸检测鲁棒性。已在开源项目Aletheia中实现。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测器在跨生成器变化、大幅压缩和对抗扰动下性能下降严重。核心问题是将语义伪影学习与物理不变量解耦，光学流不连续、镜面反射不一致和心脏调制反射（rPPG）等物理特征被当作后验特征或直接忽略。
AI.method: PhyLAA-X扩展了LAA-X架构，通过三种端到端可微分的物理特征：光学流卷曲、镜面反射偏度和空间上采样的rPPG功率谱，采用交叉注意力门控和共振一致性损失直接注入注意力计算。部署在高效时空集成网络中，使用不确定性感知的自适应加权。
AI.result: 在FaceForensics++(c23)达到97.2%准确率/0.992 AUC-ROC；Celeb-DF v2为94.9%/0.981；DFDC为90.8%/0.966。相比最强基线LAA-Net在跨生成器场景提升4.1-7.3%，对抗攻击下保持79.4%准确率。单主干消融实验显示PhyLAA-X独立贡献4.2%跨数据集AUC提升。
AI.conclusion: PhyLAA-X通过物理条件化成功将语义不一致性与物理违反特征融合，显著提升了深度伪造检测的鲁棒性和泛化能力。完整的Aletheia生产系统已开源，包含预训练权重、对抗语料库和完整的可复现组件。

title: Reciprocal Co-Training (RCT): Coupling Gradient-Based and Non-Differentiable Models via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) and classical machine learning methods offer complementary strengths for predictive modeling, yet their fundamentally different representations and training paradigms hinder effective integration: LLMs rely on gradient-based optimization over textual data, whereas models such as Random Forests (RF) employ non-differentiable feature partitioning. This work introduces a reciprocal co-training framework that couples an LLM with an RF classifier via reinforcement learning, creating an iterative feedback loop in which each model improves using signals from the other. Tabular data are reformulated into standardized textual representations for the LLM, whose embeddings augment the RF feature space, while calibrated RF probability estimates provide feedback signals that guide reinforcement learning updates of the LLM. Experiments across three medical datasets demonstrate consistent performance gains for both models, with particularly strong effects for the LLM. Ablation analyses show that iterative refinement, hybrid reward design, and dimensionality control jointly contribute to these gains. The proposed framework provides a general mechanism that allows incompatible model families to leverage each other's strengths through bidirectional adaptation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个通过强化学习耦合大语言模型和随机森林分类器的互惠协同训练框架，实现了两种异构模型的相互促进和性能提升。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型(LMMs)和传统机器学习方法具有互补优势，但它们根本不同的表示方法和训练范式阻碍了有效集成：LLMs基于文本数据进行梯度优化，而随机森林等模型采用不可微分的特征分割。
AI.method: 建立了一个互惠协同训练框架：将表格数据重构为标准化的文本表示供LLM使用，其嵌入向量增强RF的特征空间；校准后的RF概率估计提供反馈信号，指导LLM的强化学习更新。创建了一个迭代反馈循环，每个模型利用来自另一个模型的信号进行改进。
AI.result: 在三个医学数据集上的实验表明，两种模型都实现了一致的性能提升，对LLM的效果尤为显著。消融分析显示，迭代优化、混合奖励设计和维度控制共同促成了这些性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架提供了一种通用机制，使不兼容的模型族能够通过双向适应相互利用优势，为异构模型集成开辟了新途径。

title: Geometry-Aware CLIP Retrieval via Local Cross-Modal Alignment and Steering
summary: CLIP retrieval is typically framed as a pointwise similarity problem in a shared embedding space. While CLIP achieves strong global cross-modal alignment, many retrieval failures arise from local geometric inconsistencies: nearby items are incorrectly ordered, leading to systematic confusions (e.g., pentagon vs. hexagon) and produces diffuse, weakly controlled result sets. Prior work largely optimizes for point wise relevance or finetuning to mitigate these problems. We instead view retrieval as a problem of neighborhood alignment. Our work introduces (1) neighborhood-level re-ranking via Hungarian matching, which rewards structural consistency; (2) query-conditioned local steering, where directions derived from contrastive neighborhoods around the query reshape retrieval. We show that these techniques improve retrieval performance on attribute-binding and compositional retrieval tasks. Together, these methods operate on local neighborhoods but serve different roles: re-ranking rewards alignment whereas local steering controls neighborhood structure. This shows that retrieval quality and controllability depend critically on local structure, which can be exploited at inference time without retraining.

AI.tldr: 本文将CLIP检索问题从点对点相似性重新定义为邻域对齐问题，提出了基于匈牙利匹配的邻域重排序和查询条件下的局部引导两种方法，无需重新训练即可显著提升组合检索的性能和可控性。
AI.motivation: 传统CLIP检索方法虽然具有良好的全局跨模态对齐效果，但存在局部几何不一致的问题，导致检索结果排序混乱（如五边形与六边形的混淆），结果集扩散且控制性弱。现有方法主要优化点对点相关性或微调模型，但未能从根本上解决邻域结构问题。
AI.method: 提出两种推理时技术：(1)基于匈牙利匹配的邻域级重排序，奖励结构一致性；(2)查询条件下的局部引导，利用查询周围对比邻域的方向来重塑检索结果。两种方法都在局部邻域上操作但作用不同：重排序奖励对齐，局部引导控制邻域结构。
AI.result: 在属性绑定和组合检索任务上，所提方法显著提升了检索性能。这表明检索质量和可控性关键依赖于局部结构，且可在推理时无需重新训练即可利用这一特性。
AI.conclusion: 检索质量不仅取决于全局对齐，更关键的是局部邻域结构的对齐和控制。本文提出的推理时方法为改进CLIP类模型的组合检索能力提供了新思路，强调了局部结构在跨模态检索中的重要性。

title: Data Mixing for Large Language Models Pretraining: A Survey and Outlook
summary: Large language models (LLMs) rely on pretraining on massive and heterogeneous corpora, where training data composition has a decisive impact on training efficiency and downstream generalization under realistic compute and data budget constraints. Unlike sample-level data selection, data mixing optimizes domain-level sampling weights to allocate limited budgets more effectively. In recent years, a growing body of work has proposed principled data mixing methods for LLM pretraining; however, the literature remains fragmented and lacks a dedicated, systematic survey. This paper provides a comprehensive review of data mixing for LLM pretraining. We first formalize data mixture optimization as a bilevel problem on the probability simplex and clarify the role of data mixing in the pretraining pipeline, and briefly explain how existing methods make this formulation tractable in practice. We then introduce a fine-grained taxonomy that organizes existing methods along two dimensions: static versus dynamic mixing. Static mixing is further categorized into rule-based and learning-based methods, while dynamic mixing is grouped into adaptive and externally guided families. For each class, we summarize representative approaches and analyze their strengths and limitations from a performance-cost trade-off perspective. Building on this analysis, we highlight challenges that cut across methods, including limited transferability across data domains, optimization objectives, models, and validation sets, as well as unstandardized evaluation protocols and benchmarks, and the inherent tension between performance gains and cost control in learning-based methods. Finally, we outline several exploratory directions, including finer-grained domain partitioning and inverse data mixing, as well as pipeline-aware designs, aiming to provide conceptual and methodological insights for future research.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文对大语言模型预训练中的数据混合方法进行了系统性综述，将现有方法分为静态和动态两大类，分析了各类方法的优缺点，并指出了当前挑战和未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型需要在海量异质语料库上进行预训练，训练数据组成对训练效率和下游泛化能力具有决定性影响。数据混合通过优化领域级采样权重来有效分配有限的计算和数据预算，但现有文献分散且缺乏系统性综述。
AI.method: 首次将数据混合优化形式化为概率单纯形上的双层问题，提出细粒度分类框架：静态混合（基于规则和基于学习）和动态混合（自适应和外部引导）。从性能-成本权衡角度分析每类代表性方法的优缺点。
AI.result: 系统性梳理了LLM预训练数据混合的研究现状，揭示了跨数据领域、优化目标、模型和验证集的迁移性有限、评估协议和基准标准化不足、性能增益与成本控制的内在矛盾等关键挑战。
AI.conclusion: 为未来研究提供了概念和方法学见解，提出了更细粒度领域划分、逆数据混合以及流水线感知设计等探索方向，旨在促进该领域的标准化和进一步发展。

title: An Uncertainty-Aware Loss Function Incorporating Fuzzy Logic: Application to MRI Brain Image Segmentation
summary: Accurate brain image segmentation, particularly for distinguishing various tissues from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) images, plays a pivotal role in finding the neurological dis ease and medical image computing. In deep learning approaches, loss functions are very crucial for optimizing the model. In this study, we introduce a novel loss function integrating fuzzy logic to deals uncertainty issues in brain image segmentation into various tissues. It integrates the well-known categorical cross-entropy (CCE) loss function and fuzzy entropy based on fuzzy logic. By employing fuzzy logic, this loss function accounts for the inherent uncertainties in pixel classifications. The proposed loss function has been evaluated on two publicly available benchmark datasets, IBSR and OASIS, using two widely recognised architectures, U-Net and U-Net++. Experimental results demonstrate that the trained model with proposed loss function provided better results in comparison to the CCE optimisation function in terms of various performance metrics. Additionally, it effectively enhances segmentation performance while handling meaningful uncer tainty during training. The findings suggest that this approach not only improves segmentation outcomes but also contributes to the reliability of model predictions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合模糊逻辑的新型损失函数，用于解决脑部MRI图像分割中的不确定性问题，在IBSR和OASIS数据集上优于传统的分类交叉熵损失函数。
AI.motivation: 脑部MRI图像的精确分割对神经疾病诊断和医学图像计算至关重要。在深度学习方法中，损失函数对模型优化非常关键，而现有的损失函数无法有效处理像素分类中的固有不确定性。
AI.method: 结合模糊逻辑思想，将分类交叉熵(CCE)损失函数与基于模糊逻辑的模糊熵相融合，提出新型损失函数。该函数通过模糊逻辑来考虑像素分类中的固有不确定性。
AI.result: 在IBSR和OASIS两个公开基准数据集上，使用U-Net和U-Net++两种架构进行实验。结果表明，使用所提出损失函数训练的模型在各种性能指标上均优于使用CCE优化函数的模型。
AI.conclusion: 该模糊逻辑损失函数不仅有效提高了分割性能，还能在训练过程中处理有意义的不确定性，从而提高了模型预测的可靠性，为脑部图像分割提供了一种更鲁棒的解决方案。

title: LiFT: Does Instruction Fine-Tuning Improve In-Context Learning for Longitudinal Modelling by Large Language Models?
summary: Longitudinal NLP tasks require reasoning over temporally ordered text to detect persistence and change in human behavior and opinions. However, in-context learning with large language models struggles on tasks where models must integrate historical context, track evolving interactions, and handle rare change events. We introduce LiFT, a longitudinal instruction fine-tuning framework that unifies diverse longitudinal modeling tasks under a shared instruction schema. LiFT uses a curriculum that progressively increases temporal difficulty while incorporating few-shot structure and temporal conditioning to encourage effective use of past context. We evaluate LiFT across five datasets. Models trained on longitudinal tasks with different levels of temporal granularity are tested for generalisability on two separate datasets. Across models with different parameter sizes (OLMo (1B/7B), LLaMA-8B, and Qwen-14B), LiFT consistently outperforms base-model ICL, with strong gains on out-of-distribution data and minority change events.

AI.tldr: LiFT是一个纵向指令微调框架，通过统一的多任务指令模式和渐进式时序难度课程，显著提升大语言模型在纵向NLP任务上的性能，特别是在处理分布外数据和少数变化事件方面表现出色。
AI.motivation: 现有的纵向NLP任务需要模型对时序文本进行推理，以检测人类行为和观点的持续性和变化。然而，大语言模型的上下文学习方法在整合历史上下文、追踪演化互动和处理稀有变化事件方面存在困难。
AI.method: LiFT框架采用统一的指令模式整合多样化的纵向建模任务，使用渐进式增加时序难度的课程学习，并结合少样本结构和时序条件化来促进对过去上下文的有效利用。该框架在五个数据集上进行了评估。
AI.result: LiFT在所有测试模型(OLMo 1B/7B、LLaMA-8B、Qwen-14B)上均显著超越基准模型的上下文学习效果，在分布外数据和少数变化事件上表现出强劲的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: LiFT通过创新的纵向指令微调方法，有效解决了大语言模型在纵向NLP任务中的关键挑战，为时序文本理解和变化检测提供了新的解决方案。

title: A Lightweight Transformer for Pain Recognition from Brain Activity
summary: Pain is a multifaceted and widespread phenomenon with substantial clinical and societal burden, making reliable automated assessment a critical objective. This paper presents a lightweight transformer architecture that fuses multiple fNIRS representations through a unified tokenization mechanism, enabling joint modeling of complementary signal views without requiring modality-specific adaptations or increasing architectural complexity. The proposed token-mixing strategy preserves spatial, temporal, and time-frequency characteristics by projecting heterogeneous inputs onto a shared latent representation, using a structured segmentation scheme to control the granularity of local aggregation and global interaction. The model is evaluated on the AI4Pain dataset using stacked raw waveform and power spectral density representations of fNIRS inputs. Experimental results demonstrate competitive pain recognition performance while remaining computationally compact, making the approach suitable for real-time inference on both GPU and CPU hardware.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种轻量级Transformer架构，通过统一的token化机制融合多种fNIRS表示，实现高效的疼痛识别。
AI.motivation: 疼痛是一种复杂且普遍的现象，具有重大的临床和社会负担，因此需要可靠的自动评估方法。现有方法在处理多模态信号时往往需要模态特定的适配，增加了架构复杂性。
AI.method: 设计轻量级Transformer，采用统一的token化机制将原始波形和功率谱密度等不同fNIRS表示投影到共享潜空间。通过结构化分割方案控制局部聚合和全局交互的粒度，保留空间、时间和时频特征。
AI.result: 在AI4Pain数据集上的实验结果显示该方法取得竞争性的疼痛识别性能，同时保持计算简洁性，可在GPU和CPU硬件上进行实时推理。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为疼痛自动评估提供了一种高效的多模态融合方案，在保持性能的同时显著降低了计算复杂度，具有重要的临床应用价值。

title: QU-NLP at QIAS 2026: Multi-Stage QLoRA Fine-Tuning for Arabic Islamic Inheritance Reasoning
comment: Accepted for publication, The 7th Workshop on Open-Source Arabic Corpora and Processing Tools, LREC26 conference
summary: Islamic inheritance law (ilm al-mawarıth) presents a challenging domain for evaluating large language models' structured reasoning capabilities, requiring multi-step legal analysis, rule-based blocking decisions, and precise fractional calculations. We present QU-NLP's submission to the QIAS 2026 shared task on Arabic Islamic inheritance reasoning. Our approach employs a multi-stage Quantized Low-Rank Adaptation (QLoRA) fine-tuning strategy on Qwen3-4B: (1) domain adaptation on 3,166 Islamic fatwa records to acquire inheritance terminology and jurisprudential reasoning patterns, followed by (2) task-specific training on 12,000 structured inheritance cases to optimize JSON-formatted output generation. Using 4-bit NF4 quantization with rank-128 LoRA adapters, our model achieves 90% MIR-E (Mawarith Inheritance Reasoning Evaluation) score on the test set, demonstrating competitive performance while requiring minimal computational resources. Our results show that domain-specific pre-adaptation combined with structured output training enables small language models to perform complex legal reasoning tasks effectively comparing to commercial systems such as Gemini-2.5-flash.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过两阶段QLoRA微调策略，在小型语言模型上实现了伊斯兰遗产法复杂推理任务，取得90%的测试分数
AI.motivation: 伊斯兰遗产法（ilm al-mawarıth）是一个极具挑战性的领域，需要多步法律分析、规则阻断决策和精确的分数计算，为评估大型语言模型的结构化推理能力提供了理想的测试场景
AI.method: 采用多阶段量化低秩适应（QLoRA）微调策略，先对Qwen3-4B模型进行领域适应性训练（3,166份伊斯兰教法判例记录，获得遗产术语和法学推理模式），再进行任务特定训练（12,000个结构化遗产案例，优化JSON格式输出生成），使用4位NF4量化和秩128的LoRA适配器
AI.result: 在测试集上获得90%的MIR-E（遗产继承推理评估）分数，在最小计算资源需求下展现出竞争力，与Gemini-2.5-flash等商业系统相比效果相当
AI.conclusion: 领域特定的预适应训练结合结构化输出训练，使得小型语言模型能够有效执行复杂的法律推理任务，为计算资源受限场景下的法律AI应用提供了可行方案

title: LayerCache: Exploiting Layer-wise Velocity Heterogeneity for Efficient Flow Matching Inference
summary: Flow Matching models achieve state-of-the-art image generation quality but incur substantial inference cost due to iterative denoising through large Transformer networks. We observe that different layer groups within a Transformer exhibit markedly heterogeneous velocity dynamics: shallow layers are highly stable and amenable to aggressive caching, while deep layers undergo large velocity changes that demand full computation. Existing caching methods, however, treat the entire Transformer as a monolithic unit, applying a single caching decision per timestep and thus failing to exploit this heterogeneity. Based on this finding, we propose LayerCache, a layer-aware caching framework that partitions the Transformer into layer groups and makes independent, per-group caching decisions at each denoising step. LayerCache introduces an adaptive JVP span K selection mechanism that leverages per-group stability measurements to balance estimation accuracy and computational savings. We formulate a three-dimensional scheduling problem over timesteps, layer groups, and JVP span, and solve it with a greedy budget allocation algorithm. On Qwen-Image (1024x1024, 50 steps), LayerCache achieves PSNR 37.46 dB (+5.38 dB over MeanCache), SSIM 0.9834, and LPIPS 0.0178 (a 70% reduction over MeanCache) at 1.37x speedup, dominating all prior caching methods on the quality-speed Pareto frontier.

AI.tldr: LayerCache是一种层感知缓存框架，通过将Transformer分层分组并独立进行缓存决策，在保持高质量图像生成的同时显著提升Flow Matching模型的推理速度。
AI.motivation: Flow Matching模型虽然图像生成质量优秀，但通过大型Transformer网络进行迭代去噪的推理成本很高。研究发现Transformer不同层组具有显著的异质速度动态：浅层高度稳定适合激进缓存，而深层速度变化大需要完整计算。现有缓存方法将整个Transformer视为单体，无法利用这种异质性。
AI.method: LayerCache框架将Transformer划分为层组，在每个去噪步骤对每层组进行独立缓存决策。引入自适应JVP跨度K选择机制，利用每层组的稳定性测量来平衡估计精度和计算节省。构建时间步、层组和JVP跨度的三维调度问题，并用贪婪预算分配算法求解。
AI.result: 在Qwen-Image (1024x1024, 50步)上，LayerCache实现PSNR 37.46 dB（比MeanCache提升5.38 dB），SSIM 0.9834，LPIPS 0.0178（比MeanCache减少70%），获得1.37倍加速，在质量-速度帕累托前沿上优于所有之前的缓存方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用Transformer层间的异质性动态特征，LayerCache实现了更细粒度的缓存控制，在保持卓越图像生成质量的同时显著降低了Flow Matching模型的计算开销，为大模型的高效推理提供了新思路。

title: Measuring Representation Robustness in Large Language Models for Geometry
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly evaluated on mathematical reasoning, yet their robustness to equivalent problem representations remains poorly understood. In geometry, identical problems can be expressed in Euclidean, coordinate, or vector forms, but existing benchmarks report accuracy on fixed formats, implicitly assuming representation invariance and masking failures caused by representational changes alone. We propose GeoRepEval, a representation-aware evaluation framework that measures correctness, invariance, and consistency at the problem level across parallel formulations, combining strict answer matching, bootstrap confidence intervals, paired McNemar tests, representation-flip analyses, and regression controls for surface complexity. We prove that our Invariance@3 metric decomposes accuracy into robust and fragile components and is bounded by the weakest representation. Evaluating eleven LLMs on 158 curated high-school geometry problems (474 instances), we find accuracy gaps of up to 14 percentage points induced solely by representation choice. Vector formulations emerge as a consistent failure point, with Invariance@3 as low as 0.044 even after controlling for length and symbolic complexity. A convert-then-solve prompting intervention improves vector accuracy by up to 52 percentage points for high-capacity models, suggesting that failures reflect representation sensitivity rather than inability; however, low-capacity models show no gains, indicating deeper limitations. These results suggest that current models rely on representation-specific heuristics rather than abstract geometric reasoning. All datasets, prompts, and scripts are released at https://github.com/vedjaw/GeoRepEval.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了GeoRepEval评估框架，揭示了大型语言模型在几何推理中存在显著的表示敏感性问题，相同数学问题的不同表示形式会导致准确率差距达14个百分点。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM在数学推理评估中缺乏对等效问题表示鲁棒性的理解，现有基准测试采用固定格式，隐含假设了表示不变性，掩盖了仅由表示变化引起的失效问题。
AI.method: 构建GeoRepEval表示感知评估框架，通过158个精心策划的高中几何问题(474个实例)的欧几里得、坐标和向量三种平行形式，使用严格答案匹配、bootstrap置信区间、配对McNemar测试等方法评估正确性、不变性和一致性。
AI.result: 发现表示选择单独导致的准确率差距高达14个百分点，向量形式成为一致的失效点，Invariance@3指标低至0.044。转换后求解的提示干预可将向量准确率提高52个百分点，但仅对大容量模型有效。
AI.conclusion: 当前模型依赖特定表示启发式而非抽象几何推理，表明模型缺乏真正的数学理解能力，需要改进表示鲁棒性评估。

title: HQA-VLAttack: Towards High Quality Adversarial Attack on Vision-Language Pre-Trained Models
summary: Black-box adversarial attack on vision-language pre-trained models is a practical and challenging task, as text and image perturbations need to be considered simultaneously, and only the predicted results are accessible. Research on this problem is in its infancy, and only a handful of methods are available. Nevertheless, existing methods either rely on a complex iterative cross-search strategy, which inevitably consumes numerous queries, or only consider reducing the similarity of positive image-text pairs but ignore that of negative ones, which will also be implicitly diminished, thus inevitably affecting the attack performance. To alleviate the above issues, we propose a simple yet effective framework to generate high-quality adversarial examples on vision-language pre-trained models, named HQA-VLAttack, which consists of text and image attack stages. For text perturbation generation, it leverages the counter-fitting word vector to generate the substitute word set, thus guaranteeing the semantic consistency between the substitute word and the original word. For image perturbation generation, it first initializes the image adversarial example via the layer-importance guided strategy, and then utilizes contrastive learning to optimize the image adversarial perturbation, which ensures that the similarity of positive image-text pairs is decreased while that of negative image-text pairs is increased. In this way, the optimized adversarial images and texts are more likely to retrieve negative examples, thereby enhancing the attack success rate. Experimental results on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that HQA-VLAttack significantly outperforms strong baselines in terms of attack success rate.

AI.tldr: HQA-VLAttack是一种针对视觉语言预训练模型的黑盒对抗攻击框架，通过文本和图像双阶段攻击，利用反拟合词向量语义替换和基于对比学习的图像扰动优化，显著提高攻击成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型的黑盒对抗攻击方法存在两大问题：复杂的迭代交叉搜索策略消耗大量查询，或仅减少正样本相似性而忽略负样本相似性的变化，导致攻击性能受限。
AI.method: 提出HQA-VLAttack框架，包含两个阶段：1)文本攻击阶段使用反拟合词向量生成语义一致的替换词集；2)图像攻击阶段通过层重要性引导策略初始化对抗样本，然后利用对比学习优化图像扰动，同时降低正样本相似性并提高负样本相似性。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上的实验结果表明，HQA-VLAttack在攻击成功率方面显著优于强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: HQA-VLAttack通过同时优化文本和图像的对抗性扰动，巧妙地利用正负样本相似性的对比关系，为视觉语言模型的黑盒对抗攻击提供了一个简单高效的解决方案。

title: Injecting Structured Biomedical Knowledge into Language Models: Continual Pretraining vs. GraphRAG
summary: The injection of domain-specific knowledge is crucial for adapting language models (LMs) to specialized fields such as biomedicine. While most current approaches rely on unstructured text corpora, this study explores two complementary strategies for leveraging structured knowledge from the UMLS Metathesaurus: (i) Continual pretraining that embeds knowledge into model parameters, and (ii) Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG) that consults a knowledge graph at inference time. We first construct a large-scale biomedical knowledge graph from UMLS (3.4 million concepts and 34.2 million relations), stored in Neo4j for efficient querying. We then derive a ~100-million-token textual corpus from this graph to continually pretrain two models: BERTUMLS (from BERT) and BioBERTUMLS (from BioBERT). We evaluate these models on six BLURB (Biomedical Language Understanding and Reasoning Benchmark) datasets spanning five task types and evaluate GraphRAG on the two QA (Question Answering) datasets (PubMedQA, BioASQ). On BLURB tasks, BERTUMLS improves over BERT, with the largest gains on knowledge-intensive QA. Effects on BioBERT are more nuanced, suggesting diminishing returns when the base model already encodes substantial biomedical text knowledge. Finally, augmenting LLaMA 3-8B with our GraphRAG pipeline yields over than 3 points accuracy on PubMedQA and 5 points on BioASQ without any retraining, delivering transparent, multi-hop, and easily updated knowledge access. We release the processed UMLS Neo4j graph to support reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 该研究探索了利用UMLS结构化知识增强生物医学语言模型的两种策略：知识嵌入到模型参数的持续预训练，以及在推理时查询知识图的图检索增强生成(GraphRAG)
AI.motivation: 将领域特定知识注入语言模型对于适应生物医学等专业领域至关重要，但现有方法主要依赖非结构化文本语料，未能充分利用UMLS等结构化知识库的价值
AI.method: 首先从UMLS构建包含340万概念和3420万关系的大规模生物医学知识图谱并存储于Neo4j；然后衍生约1亿token文本语料对BERT和BioBERT进行持续预训练得到BERTUMLS和BioBERTUMLS；最后设计GraphRAG流程让LLaMA 3-8B在推理时查询知识图谱
AI.result: BERTUMLS在BLURB基准测试中超越原BERT，特别是在知识密集型问答任务上提升明显；GraphRAG使LLaMA 3-8B在PubMedQA和BioASQ问答任务上分别提升超过3个点和5个点准确率，且无需重新训练
AI.conclusion: 结构化知识注入为生物医学语言模型带来实质性能提升，GraphRAG提供了透明、多跳且易更新的知识访问方式，两种策略互补适用，研究已发布处理后的UMLS Neo4j图谱供复现

title: Semantically Stable Image Composition Analysis via Saliency and Gradient Vector Flow Fusion
summary: The reliable computational assessment of photographic composition requires features that are discriminative of spatial layout yet robust to semantic content. This paper proposes a low-level representation grounded in the assumption that composition can be understood as the flow of visual attention across geometric structure. We introduce VFCNet, which fuses saliency and edge information into a gradient vector flow (GVF) field. The model computes dual-stream GVF representations, integrates them via attention, and extracts multi-scale flow features with a DINOv3 backbone. VFCNet achieves state-of-the-art performance on the PICD benchmark (CDA-1: 0.683, CDA-2: 0.629), improving by 33.1\% and 36.1\% over the previous best method. We also show that a simple classifier on self-supervised DINOv3 features substantially outperforms more sophisticated, composition-specialized models. Code is available at https://github.com/ADadras/VFCNet

AI.tldr: VFCNet是一种融合显著性和边缘信息的低级构图评估模型，通过梯度矢量流场建模视觉注意力流动，在PICD基准测试上实现了33.1%和36.1%的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 可靠的摄影构图计算评估需要能够辨别空间布局同时对语义内容鲁棒的特征，现有方法在此方面存在不足。
AI.method: 提出VFCNet模型，基于构图可理解为几何结构上视觉注意力流动的假设。模型融合显著性和边缘信息生成梯度矢量流场，采用双流GVF表示，通过注意力机制整合，并结合DINOv3骨干网络提取多尺度流动特征。
AI.result: 在PICD基准测试上达到最优性能(CDA-1: 0.683, CDA-2: 0.629)，相比之前最佳方法分别提升33.1%和36.1%。同时发现基于自监督DINOv3特征的简单分类器显著超越专门的构图模型。
AI.conclusion: VFCNet证明了基于视觉注意力流动的构图表示方法的有效性，同时揭示了自监督学习特征在构图评估任务中的巨大潜力，为该领域提供了新的研究方向。

title: HalluSAE: Detecting Hallucinations in Large Language Models via Sparse Auto-Encoders
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are powerful and widely adopted, but their practical impact is limited by the well-known hallucination phenomenon. While recent hallucination detection methods have made notable progress, we find most of them overlook the dynamic nature and underlying mechanisms of it. To address this gap, we propose HalluSAE, a phase transition-inspired framework that models hallucination as a critical shift in the model's latent dynamics. By modeling the generation process as a trajectory through a potential energy landscape, HalluSAE identifies critical transition zones and attributes factual errors to specific high-energy sparse features. Our approach consists of three stages: (1) Potential Energy Empowered Phase Zone Localization via sparse autoencoders and a geometric potential energy metric; (2) Hallucination-related Sparse Feature Attribution using contrastive logit attribution; and (3) Probing-based Causal Hallucination Detection through linear probes on disentangled features. Extensive experiments on Gemma-2-9B demonstrate that HalluSAE achieves state-of-the-art hallucination detection performance.

AI.tldr: HalluSAE是一个受相变启发的大模型幻觉检测框架，通过分析模型潜在动力学的临界转变来识别和归因事实错误，在Gemma-2-9B上达到了最先进的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型幻觉检测方法忽视了幻觉现象的动态本质和底层机制，无法有效捕捉幻觉产生的根本原因。
AI.method: 提出三阶段框架：1) 基于稀疏自编码器和几何势能度量的相变区域定位；2) 使用对比logit归因的幻觉相关稀疏特征归因；3) 基于解耦特征线性探针的因果幻觉检测。将生成过程建模为在势能景观中的轨迹，识别临界转变区。
AI.result: 在Gemma-2-9B上的大量实验表明，HalluSAE在幻觉检测任务上实现了最先进的性能，成功将事实错误归因于特定的高能稀疏特征。
AI.conclusion: 通过将相变理论引入幻觉检测，HalluSAE提供了一种理解幻觉动态本质的新视角，为大模型事实性检测提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Topology-Aware Layer Pruning for Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in natural language understanding and reasoning, while recent extensions that incorporate visual inputs enable them to process multimodal information. Despite these advances, Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) incur substantial computational and memory costs, hindering deployment in resource-constrained scenarios. Existing layer pruning methods typically rely on local similarity metrics or static proxy signals, failing to capture the global and dynamic evolution of representations across model depth, which often leads to the removal of transition-critical layers. To address this limitation, we propose a topology-aware layer pruning framework for LVLMs. Specifically, we represent layer wise hidden states as point clouds and models their evolution using \textit{simplicial complexes}. By leveraging \textit{zigzag persistent homology}, we quantify inter-layer topological consistency and enable adaptive pruning that preserves critical representational transitions. Extensive experiments on diverse multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently outperforms existing pruning methods across a wide range of sparsity ratios. Our code is available at https://github.com/zpc456/TopoVLM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于拓扑感知的大型视觉-语言模型剪枝框架，通过单纯复形和锯齿持久同调量化层间拓扑一致性，实现自适应剪枝，在保持关键表示转换的同时显著降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉-语言模型(LVLMs)在多模态任务中表现优异，但存在巨大的计算和内存开销，限制了其在资源受限环境下的部署。现有的剪枝方法主要依赖局部相似性指标或静态代理信号，无法捕捉表示在整个模型深度中的全局动态演化，经常会错误地移除处于关键转换状态的层级。
AI.method: 提出拓扑感知的层剪枝框架：将各层隐藏状态表示为点云，使用单纯复形建模表示演化过程。通过锯齿持久同调技术量化层间拓扑一致性，实现自适应剪枝策略，保留关键的表示转换层。
AI.result: 在多个多模态基准测试上的广泛实验表明，所提框架在各种稀疏度比率下均持续优于现有剪枝方法，证明了该方法的有效性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究成功将拓扑数据分析引入LVLM剪枝领域，通过捕获表示的全局演化特征，实现了更精准的层剪枝。该框架在保持模型性能的同时有效降低了计算复杂度，为资源受限场景下的多模态模型部署提供了新思路。

title: SynopticBench: Evaluating Vision-Language Models on Generating Weather Forecast Discussions of the Future
comment: Accepted for presentation at Climate Informatics 2026
summary: Recent advances in visual-language models (VLMs) have led to significant improvements in a plethora of complex multimodal tasks like image captioning, report generation, and visual perception. However, generating text from meteorological data is highly challenging because the atmosphere is a chaotic system that is rapidly changing at various spatial and temporal scales. Given the complexity of atmospheric phenomena, it is critical to verifiably quantify the effectiveness of existing VLMs on weather forecasting data. In this work, we present SynopticBench, a high-quality dataset consisting of 1,367,041 text samples of Area Forecast Discussions created by the National Weather Service over the continental United States paired to images of 500mb geopotential height, 2 meter temperature, and 850mb wind velocity in weather forecasts. We also present Synoptic Phenomena Alignment and Coverage Evaluation (SPACE), a novel evaluation framework that can be used to effectively estimate the quality of text descriptions of synoptic weather phenomena. Extensive experiments on generating forecast discussions using state-of-the-art VLMs show the sensitivity of existing evaluation metrics in this domain and enable further exploration into synoptic weather and climate text generation.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了SynopticBench数据集和SPACE评估框架，用于评估视觉语言模型在天气现象文本生成任务中的表现，解决了现有模型在气象数据文本生成方面缺乏有效评估的问题。
AI.motivation: 大气是混沌系统，空间和时间尺度变化快速，从气象数据生成文本极具挑战性。现有视觉语言模型（VLMs）在图像字幕等任务表现良好，但在天气预测领域缺乏有效的质量评估标准，迫切需要专门的评估方法和数据集。
AI.method: 构建了包含136.7万个样本的SynopticBench数据集，将美国国家气象局发布的区域预测讨论文本与500mb位势高度、2米温度和850mb风速的预报图像配对。同时提出了天气现象对齐和覆盖度评估（SPACE）框架，用于有效评估天气现象文本描述的质量。
AI.result: 通过对先进VLMs在生成预测讨论方面的广泛实验，揭示了现有评估指标在该领域的敏感性，为天气和气候文本生成的进一步探索提供了基础。
AI.conclusion: 该工作填补了VLMs在气象文本生成评估领域的空白，为量化评估模型在复杂天气现象描述中的表现提供了重要工具和数据支撑。

title: Motif-Video 2B: Technical Report
summary: Training strong video generation models usually requires massive datasets, large parameter counts, and substantial compute. In this work, we ask whether strong text-to-video quality is possible at a much smaller budget: fewer than 10M clips and less than 100,000 H200 GPU hours. Our core claim is that part of the answer lies in how model capacity is organized, not only in how much of it is used. In video generation, prompt alignment, temporal consistency, and fine-detail recovery can interfere with one another when they are handled through the same pathway. Motif-Video 2B addresses this by separating these roles architecturally, rather than relying on scale alone. The model combines two key ideas. First, Shared Cross-Attention strengthens text control when video token sequences become long. Second, a three-part backbone separates early fusion, joint representation learning, and detail refinement. To make this design effective under a limited compute budget, we pair it with an efficient training recipe based on dynamic token routing and early-phase feature alignment to a frozen pretrained video encoder. Our analysis shows that later blocks develop clearer cross-frame attention structure than standard single-stream baselines. On VBench, Motif-Video~2B reaches 83.76\%, surpassing Wan2.1 14B while using 7$\times$ fewer parameters and substantially less training data. These results suggest that careful architectural specialization, combined with an efficiency-oriented training recipe, can narrow or exceed the quality gap typically associated with much larger video models.

AI.tldr: Motif-Video 2B通过创新的架构设计，仅用20亿参数就在视频生成质量上超过了140亿参数的Wan2.1，证明精心设计的模型结构比单纯扩大规模更有效。
AI.motivation: 传统视频生成需要海量数据、庞大参数和巨大算力，本文探索如何在有限的预算下（少于1000万片段、10万H200 GPU小时）实现高质量文本到视频生成。
AI.method: 提出双关键创新：1) 共享交叉注意力机制增强长视频序列的文本控制；2) 三段式骨干网络分离早期融合、联合表示学习和细节细化。结合动态token路由和冷冻特征对齐的高效训练策略。
AI.result: 在VBench基准测试中达到83.76%分数，超越Wan2.1 14B模型，参数量减少7倍，训练数据也大幅减少。分析显示模型后期模块展现出更清晰的跨帧注意力结构。
AI.conclusion: 精心设计的架构专业化结合高效训练策略，能够缩小甚至超越通常与更大规模视频模型相关的质量差距，证明了模型容量组织方式比单纯增加容量更重要。

title: EchoChain: A Full-Duplex Benchmark for State-Update Reasoning Under Interruptions
summary: Real-time voice assistants must revise task state when users interrupt mid-response, but existing spoken-dialog benchmarks largely evaluate turn-based interaction and miss this failure mode. We introduce EchoChain, a controlled benchmark for evaluating full-duplex state-update reasoning under mid-speech interruptions. EchoChain identifies three recurring failure patterns in post-interruption continuations: contextual inertia, interruption amnesia, and objective displacement. The benchmark generates scenario-driven conversations and injects interruptions at a standardized point relative to assistant speech onset, enabling controlled cross-model comparison. In a paired half-duplex control, total failures drop by 40.2% relative to interrupted runs, indicating that many errors are driven by state-update reasoning under interruption rather than task difficulty alone. Across evaluated real-time voice models, no system exceeds a 50% pass rate, showing substantial room for improvement in mid-generation state revision. EchoChain provides a reproducible benchmark for diagnosing state-update reasoning failures in full-duplex voice interaction.

AI.tldr: EchoChain是一个评估全双工语音助手在用户中断对话时状态更新能力的基准测试，揭示了现有系统在上下文惯性、中断遗忘和目标偏移三个方面的严重缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有语音对话基准主要评估轮式交互，而忽略了实时语音助手在用户中途打断响应时的状态更新失败问题，这是一个关键的交互场景。
AI.method: EchoChain通过生成场景驱动的对话并在助手语音开始后的标准化点注入中断，创建受控的评估环境。设计了半双工对照组来分离状态更新推理与任务难度的影响。
AI.result: 所有评估的实时语音模型通过率均低于50%，与半双工对照组相比，中断情况下的总失败率增加了40.2%，表明多数错误源于中断状态下的推理而非任务难度。
AI.conclusion: EchoChain为全双工语音交互中的状态更新推理失败提供了可复现的诊断基准，显示该领域存在巨大改进空间。

title: From Handwriting to Structured Data: Benchmarking AI Digitisation of Handwritten Forms
summary: Manual digitisation of structured handwritten documents is slow and costly. We benchmark 17 leading frontier multi-modal large language models and open-source models against a very challenging real-world medical form that mixes dates; structured, printed text; hand-written responses and significant variability challenges. None of the smaller or older models perform well but the latest Google and OpenAI models reach accuracies around $85\%$ with weighted F1 scores $\simeq 90\%$ across the discrete or predefined fields despite the very challenging nature of the responses. Clear task specific strengths emerge: GPT 5.4 excels in noisy date extraction as well as reliability with the lowest hallucination rate ($6\%$). Claude Sonnet 4.6 had the best average performance across formatted fields (dates and numerical values), while Gemini 3.1 delivered the best overall performance, with the lowest free text error rates (WER = $0.50$ and CER = $0.31$) and the strongest results across discrete classification metrics. We further show that prompt optimisation dramatically improves macro precision, recall and F1 by over $60\%$, but has little impact on weighted metrics (only $\sim2-5\%$ improvement). These results provide evidence that the rapid improvements of multimodal large language models offer a compelling pathway toward fully automated digitisation of complex handwritten workflows that is particularly relevant in low- and middle-income countries.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了17个多模态大语言模型在复杂医疗表单数字化任务中的表现，最新模型达到85%准确率，提示优化可显著提升性能，为自动化手写文档数字化提供了可行方案。
AI.motivation: 人工数字化结构化手写文档速度慢、成本高，特别是在低收入和中等收入国家，需要自动化解决方案来提高效率。
AI.method: 对17个前沿多模态大语言模型进行基准测试，使用包含日期、印刷文本、手写回复和变化挑战的真实医疗表单，通过不同提示策略优化模型性能。
AI.result: Google和OpenAI最新模型准确率达85%，加权F1分数约90%；Gemini 3.1整体表现最佳，GPT 5.4日期提取最可靠，Claude Sonnet 4.6格式化字段表现突出；提示优化使宏平均指标提升60%以上。
AI.conclusion: 多模态大语言模型的快速进步为实现复杂手写工作流的完全自动化提供了令人信服的路径，对中低收入国家具有重要应用价值。

title: Revisiting a Pain in the Neck: A Semantic Reasoning Benchmark for Language Models
summary: We present SemanticQA, an evaluation suite designed to assess language models (LMs) in semantic phrase processing tasks. The benchmark consolidates existing multiword expression (MwE) resources and reorganizes them into a unified testbed. It covers both general lexical phenomena, such as lexical collocations, and three fine-grained categories: idiomatic expressions, noun compounds, and verbal constructions. Through SemanticQA, we assess LMs of diverse architectures and scales in extraction, classification, and interpretation tasks, as well as sequential task compositions. We reveal substantial performance variation, particularly on tasks requiring semantic reasoning, highlighting differences in reasoning efficacy and semantic understanding of LMs, providing insights for pushing LMs with stronger comprehension on non-trivial semantic phrases. The evaluation harness and data of SemanticQA are available at https://github.com/jacklanda/SemanticQA.

AI.tldr: SemanticQA是一个评估语言模型语义短语处理能力的基准测试套件，通过整合现有多词表达资源，构建了统一的测试平台来评估不同架构和规模的语言模型。
AI.motivation: 为了系统评估语言模型在语义短语处理方面的能力，特别是在需要语义推理的任务上的表现差异，从而推动语言模型在复杂语义理解方面的发展。
AI.method: 整合现有的多词表达(MwE)资源，重新组织为统一测试平台，涵盖一般词汇现象(如词汇搭配)和三个细分类别：习语表达、名词复合词和动词结构。通过提取、分类、解释任务以及序列任务组合来评估多样化的语言模型。
AI.result: 揭示了不同语言模型在语义短语处理任务上存在显著性能差异，特别是在需要语义推理的任务上，反映了模型在推理能力和语义理解方面的差异。
AI.conclusion: SemanticQA为评估和改进语言模型的语义理解能力提供了重要洞察，有助于推动开发具有更强语义短语理解能力的下一代语言模型。

title: Predicting Blastocyst Formation in IVF: Integrating DINOv2 and Attention-Based LSTM on Time-Lapse Embryo Images
summary: The selection of the optimal embryo for transfer is a critical yet challenging step in in vitro fertilization (IVF), primarily due to its reliance on the manual inspection of extensive time-lapse imaging data. A key obstacle in this process is predicting blastocyst formation from the limited number of daily images available. Many clinics also lack complete time-lapse systems, so full videos are often unavailable. In this study, we aimed to predict which embryos will develop into blastocysts using limited daily images from time-lapse recordings. We propose a novel hybrid model that combines DINOv2, a transformer-based vision model, with an enhanced long short-term memory (LSTM) network featuring a multi-head attention layer. DINOv2 extracts meaningful features from embryo images, and the LSTM model then uses these features to analyze embryo development over time and generate final predictions. We tested our model on a real dataset of 704 embryo videos. The model achieved 96.4% accuracy, surpassing existing methods. It also performs well with missing frames, making it valuable for many IVF laboratories with limited imaging systems. Our approach can assist embryologists in selecting better embryos more efficiently and with greater confidence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合DINOv2和增强型LSTM的混合模型，使用有限的每日胚胎图像预测囊胚形成，在704个胚胎视频上实现了96.4%的准确率，即使在缺失帧的情况下也表现良好。
AI.motivation: 体外受精(IVF)中选择最优胚胎是一个关键但具有挑战性的步骤，主要依赖于手动检查大量延时成像数据。关键挑战是从有限的每日可用图像中预测囊胚形成，且许多诊所缺乏完整的延时系统导致完整视频不可用。
AI.method: 提出新颖的混合模型，将基于transformer的视觉模型DINOv2与具有多头注意力层的增强型长短期记忆(LSTM)网络结合。DINOv2从胚胎图像中提取有意义的特征，LSTM模型则使用这些特征分析胚胎随时间的发展并生成最终预测。
AI.result: 在704个真实胚胎视频数据集上进行测试，模型达到了96.4%的准确率，超越了现有方法。该模型在缺失帧的情况下也表现良好，适用于成像系统有限的IVF实验室。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可以帮助胚胎学家更高效、更自信地选择更好的胚胎，为IVF实验室提供了一个实用且有效的辅助决策工具。

title: Spotlights and Blindspots: Evaluation Machine-Generated Text Detection
summary: With the rise of generative language models, machine-generated text detection has become a critical challenge. A wide variety of models is available, but inconsistent datasets, evaluation metrics, and assessment strategies obscure comparisons of model effectiveness. To address this, we evaluate 15 different detection models from six distinct systems, as well as seven trained models, across seven English-language textual test sets and three creative human-written datasets. We provide an empirical analysis of model performance, the influence of training and evaluation data, and the impact of key metrics. We find that no single system excels in all areas and nearly all are effective for certain tasks, and the representation of model performance is critically linked to dataset and metric choices. We find high variance in model ranks based on datasets and metrics, and overall poor performance on novel human-written texts in high-risk domains. Across datasets and metrics, we find that methodological choices that are often assumed or overlooked are essential for clearly and accurately reflecting model performance.

AI.tldr: 本文对15种机器生成文本检测模型进行系统性评估，发现没有单一模型在所有场景下表现最优，模型性能高度依赖于数据集和评估指标的选择，在高风险领域的创新人类文本检测上表现普遍较差。
AI.motivation: 随着生成式语言模型的兴起，机器生成文本检测成为关键挑战，但现有的模型在数据集、评估指标和评估策略方面存在不一致性，导致难以准确比较模型效果。
AI.method: 评估了来自6个不同系统的15种检测模型和7个训练模型，在7个英语文本测试集和3个创意人类写作数据集上进行测试，对模型性能、训练评估数据影响和关键指标影响进行实证分析。
AI.result: 研究发现没有单一系统在所有领域都表现卓越，几乎所有模型在特定任务上都有效，模型性能表现与数据集和指标选择密切相关；不同数据集和指标下模型排名差异很大，在高风险领域的创新人类文本上整体表现较差。
AI.conclusion: 方法选择（通常被忽略或假设）对于清晰准确地反映模型性能至关重要，建立标准化的评估框架和指标体系对机器生成文本检测领域的发展具有重要意义。

title: Medical thinking with multiple images
comment: Equal contribution for the first two authors. To appear in the proceedings of the Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2026). Code is in https://github.com/benluwang/MedThinkVQA. Dataset is in https://huggingface.co/datasets/bio-nlp-umass/MedThinkVQA
summary: Large language models perform well on many medical QA benchmarks, but real clinical reasoning often requires integrating evidence across multiple images rather than interpreting a single view. We introduce MedThinkVQA, an expert-annotated benchmark for thinking with multiple images, where models must interpret each image, combine cross-view evidence, and answer diagnostic questions with intermediate supervision and step-level evaluation. The dataset contains 8,067 cases, including 720 test cases, with an average of 6.62 images per case, substantially denser than prior work, whose expert-level benchmarks use at most 1.43 images per case. On the test set, the best closed-source models, Claude-4.6-Opus, Gemini-3-Pro, and GPT-5.2-xhigh, reach only 57.2%, 55.3%, and 54.9% accuracy, while GPT-5-mini and GPT-5-nano reach 39.7% and 30.8%. Strong open-source models lag behind, led by Qwen3.5-397B-A17B at 52.2% and Qwen3.5-27B at 50.6%. Further analysis identifies grounded multi-image reasoning as the main bottleneck: models often fail to extract, align, and compose evidence across views before higher-level inference can help. Providing expert single-image cues and cross-image summaries improves performance, whereas replacing them with self-generated intermediates reduces accuracy. Step-level analysis shows that over 70% of errors arise from image reading and cross-view integration. Scaling results further show that additional inference-time computation helps only when visual grounding is already reliable; when early evidence extraction is weak, longer reasoning yields limited or unstable gains and can amplify misread cues. These results suggest that the key challenge is not reasoning length alone, but reliable mechanisms for grounding, aligning, and composing distributed evidence across real-world multimodal clinical inputs.

AI.tldr: 医学多图像推理基准测试MedThinkVQA显示，当前大语言模型在整合多视图临床证据方面存在显著瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有医学QA模型通常处理单张图像，但真实临床诊断需要综合分析多张检查图像的证据，缺乏相应的评估基准。
AI.method: 构建包含8,067个病例的专家标注MedThinkVQA基准，平均每例6.62张图像，通过中间监督和步骤级评估测试模型的多图像推理能力。
AI.result: 表现最佳的闭源模型Claude-4.6-Opus准确率仅57.2%，开源模型最高为52.2%；70%以上错误源于图像读取和跨视图整合；增加推理时间计算只有在视觉基础可靠时才有效。
AI.conclusion: 医学多图像推理的核心挑战不在于推理长度，而在于建立可靠的证据基础、对齐和组合机制，以处理真实世界多模态临床输入。

title: Aligning Backchannel and Dialogue Context Representations via Contrastive LLM Fine-Tuning
summary: Backchannels (e.g., `yeah', `mhm', and `right') are short, non-interruptive feedback signals whose lexical form and prosody jointly convey pragmatic meaning. While prior computational research has largely focused on predicting backchannel timing, the relationship between lexico-prosodic form and meaning remains underexplored. We propose a two-stage framework: first, fine-tuning large language models on dialogue transcripts to derive rich contextual representations; and second, learning a joint embedding space for dialogue contexts and backchannel realizations. We evaluate alignment with human perception via triadic similarity judgments (prosodic and cross-lexical) and a context-backchannel suitability task. Our results demonstrate that the learned projections substantially improve context-backchannel retrieval compared to previous methods. In addition, they reveal that backchannel form is highly sensitive to extended conversational context and that the learned embeddings align more closely with human judgments than raw WavLM features.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一个两阶段框架，通过微调大型语言模型和联合嵌入学习，研究反馈信号的词汇-韵律形式与语用意义的关系，证明了上下文敏感性和与人类感知的更好对齐。
AI.motivation: 反馈信号在对话中具有重要语用功能，但现有研究主要关注时间预测，忽略了词汇-韵律形式与含义之间的关系，需要建立更深入的语义理解模型。
AI.method: 采用两阶段框架：首先在对话语料上微调大型语言模型获得上下文表示，然后学习对话上下文与反馈信号实现的联合嵌入空间，通过三元组相似性判断和适合性任务进行评估。
AI.result: 学习到的投影显著提升了上下文-反馈信号的检索效果，发现反馈信号形式对扩展对话上下文高度敏感，且嵌入表示比原始WavLM特征更接近人类判断。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功建立了反馈信号形式与语用meaning之间的联系，证明了上下文信息的重要性，为对话系统中反馈信号的生成和理解提供了新的技术途径。

title: Medial Axis Aware Learning of Signed Distance Functions
summary: We propose a novel variational method to compute a highly accurate global signed distance function (SDF) to a given point cloud. To this end, the jump set of the gradient of the SDF, which coincides with the medial axis of the surface, is explicitly taken into account through a higher-order variational formulation that enforces linear growth along the gradient direction away from this discontinuity set. The eikonal equation and the zero-level set of the SDF are enforced as constraints. To make this variational problem computationally tractable, a phase field approximation of Ambrosio-Tortorelli type is employed. The associated phase field function implicitly describes the medial axis. The method is implemented for surfaces represented by unoriented point clouds using neural network approximations of both the SDF and the phase field. Experiments demonstrate the method's accuracy both in the near field and globally. Quantitative and qualitative comparisons with other approaches show the advantages of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种新颖的变分方法，用于计算给定点云的高精度全局符号距离函数（SDF），通过显式考虑梯度跳跃集（与中轴线重合）并利用相场近似来处理不连续性。
AI.motivation: 传统SDF计算方法在全局精度和中轴线处理方面存在局限性，需要一种能够显式处理梯度不连续性并提供高精度全局SDF的新方法。
AI.method: 采用高阶变分公式，考虑SDF梯度的跳跃集（中轴线），强制执行eikonal方程和零水平集约束，使用Ambrosio-Tortorelli型相场近似使计算可行，并通过神经网络近似SDF和相场函数。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在近场和全局都具有很高的精度，定量和定性比较结果显示相比其他方法具有显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 提出的变分方法成功解决了点云SDF计算中的梯度不连续性问题，通过相场隐式描述中轴线，实现了高精度的全局SDF重建，在点云处理领域具有重要应用价值。

title: AdaExplore: Failure-Driven Adaptation and Diversity-Preserving Search for Efficient Kernel Generation
comment: Preliminary work. The implementation is available at https://github.com/StigLidu/AdaExplore
summary: Recent large language model (LLM) agents have shown promise in using execution feedback for test-time adaptation. However, robust self-improvement remains far from solved: most approaches still treat each problem instance independently, without accumulating reusable knowledge. This limitation is particularly pronounced in domain-specific languages such as Triton, which are underrepresented in LLM pretraining data. Their strict constraints and non-linear optimization landscape further make naive generation and local refinement unreliable. We propose AdaExplore, an agent framework that enables self-improvement via accumulated execution feedback for performance-critical kernel code generation through two complementary stages: failure-driven adaptation and diversity-preserving search, jointly improving correctness and optimization performance without additional fine-tuning or external knowledge. In the adaptation stage, the agent synthesizes tasks and converts recurring failures into a reusable memory of validity rules, helping subsequent generations remain within the feasible set. In the search stage, the agent organizes candidate kernels as a tree and alternates between small local refinements and larger structural regeneration, allowing it to explore the optimization landscape beyond local optima. Experiments on kernel runtime optimization benchmarks validate these gains: AdaExplore achieves 3.12x and 1.72x speedups on KernelBench Level-2 and Level-3, respectively, within 100 steps, and continues to improve with additional computation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AdaExplore框架，能够通过积累执行反馈自主学习改进并生成性能关键的内核代码，无需额外微调或外部知识。
AI.motivation: 现有大型语言模型代理在测试时自适应方面存在局限性：独立处理问题实例而无法积累可重用知识；在特定领域语言如Triton中表现不佳，其严格约束和非线性优化空间使得简单的生成和局部细改进不可靠。
AI.method: AdaExplore框架包含两个互补阶段：1）故障驱动自适应阶段，合成任务并将重复故障转换为可重用的有效性规则记忆；2）多样性保持搜索阶段，将候选内核组织为树状结构，交替进行局部细改进和结构重生成，探索超越局部最优的优化空间。
AI.result: 在内核运行时优化基准测试中，AdaExplore在100步内分别实现了KernelBench Level-2和Level-3的3.12倍和1.72倍加速，并能随着计算量增加而持续改进。
AI.conclusion: AdaExplore通过积累执行反馈实现了有效的自我改进机制，在特定领域代码生成任务中展现出优异的性能优化能力，为LLM代理的知识积累和自适应学习提供了新的解决方案。

title: SynthPID: P&ID digitization from Topology-Preserving Synthetic Data
summary: Automating the digitization of Piping and Instrumentation Diagrams (P&IDs) into structured process graphs would unlock significant value in plant operations, yet progress is bottlenecked by a fundamental data problem: engineering drawings are proprietary, and the entire community shares a single public benchmark of just 12 annotated images. Prior attempts at synthetic augmentation have fallen short because template-based generators scatter symbols at random, producing graphs that bear little resemblance to real process plants and, accordingly, yield only approximately 33% edge detection accuracy under synth-only training. We argue the failure is structural rather than visual and address it by introducing SynthPID, a corpus of 665 synthetic P&IDs whose pipe topology is seeded directly from real drawings. Paired with a patch-based Relationformer adapted for high-resolution diagrams, a model trained on SynthPID alone achieves 63.8 +/- 3.1% edge mAP on PID2Graph OPEN100 without seeing a single real P&ID during training, closing within 8 pp of the real-data oracle. These gains hold up under a controlled comparison against the template-based regime, confirming that generation quality drives performance rather than model choice. A scaling study reveals that gains flatten beyond roughly 400 synthetic images, pointing to seed diversity as the binding constraint.

AI.tldr: SynthPID通过基于真实图纸生成合成P&ID图，将管道拓扑结构真实性提高到63.8%的边缘检测准确率，解决了现有方法仅33%准确率的问题。
AI.motivation: 工程图纸的专有性导致缺乏公共基准数据集，现有合成方法生成的符号随机分布，与真实工艺流程图相差甚远，严重限制了P&ID数字化自动化的发展。
